items.title_original: Many US rural communities oppose AI data center buildout; Pew says 67% of planned data centers are in rural areas, while 87% of existing ones are in urban areas (Financial Times)
items.title_en: Many US rural communities oppose AI data center buildout; Pew says 67% of planned data centers are in rural areas, while 87% of existing ones are in urban areas (Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 美国许多农村社区反对人工智能数据中心建设；皮尤研究中心表示，67% 的规划数据中心位于农村地区，而 87% 的现有数据中心位于城市地区（《金融时报》）
items.title_bilingual: 美国许多农村社区反对人工智能数据中心建设；皮尤研究中心表示，67% 的规划数据中心位于农村地区，而 87% 的现有数据中心位于城市地区（《金融时报》） / Many US rural communities oppose AI data center buildout; Pew says 67% of planned data centers are in rural areas, while 87% of existing ones are in urban areas (Financial Times)

items.title: An analysis of Internet Archive data finds that by mid-2025, ~35% of new websites published since ChatGPT's launch in late 2022 were AI-generated or AI-assisted (Matthew Gault/404 Media)
items.title_original: An analysis of Internet Archive data finds that by mid-2025, ~35% of new websites published since ChatGPT's launch in late 2022 were AI-generated or AI-assisted (Matthew Gault/404 Media)
items.title_en: An analysis of Internet Archive data finds that by mid-2025, ~35% of new websites published since ChatGPT's launch in late 2022 were AI-generated or AI-assisted (Matthew Gault/404 Media)
items.title_zh: 对互联网档案馆数据的分析发现，到 2025 年中期，自 2022 年末 ChatGPT 推出以来发布的新网站中约有 35% 是人工智能生成或人工智能辅助的（Matthew Gault/404 Media）
items.title_bilingual: 对互联网档案馆数据的分析发现，到 2025 年中期，自 2022 年末 ChatGPT 推出以来发布的新网站中约有 35% 是人工智能生成或人工智能辅助的（Matthew Gault/404 Media） / An analysis of Internet Archive data finds that by mid-2025, ~35% of new websites published since ChatGPT's launch in late 2022 were AI-generated or AI-assisted (Matthew Gault/404 Media)
